$comment: Allowlist of intentional API changes from v1 → v2. The API-contract diff test at build time treats differences listed here as expected and fails on any other divergence. Adding to this list requires an approved design decision in CHANGELOG.md.

TreeMenuProps.name: cacheSearch
TreeMenuProps.reason: Leaky abstraction tied to fast-memoize arg-identity caching. Replaced internally by useMemo keyed on real dependencies — correct by default, no user-facing knob.
